description: 1. 85% cotton/15% polyester double knit jacket with fold over collar and ferrari logo styling 2. Contrast stripes along the sleeves 3. Ribbed, banded cuffs and hem 4. Zippered front pockets 5. Iconic Ferrari badge at left chest 6. Ferrari branding below back collar 7. Italy badge on the right sleeve 8. Available in the Rosso Corsa shade which is the red, international motor racing colour of cars entered by teams from Italy                                                                                                                      Slip into this Scuderia Ferrari Track jacket and you'll have be blazing all over the city roads like a formula1 race car driver. The comfort quotient is a delight and the styling is a show stopper. The iconic Ferrari badge on the jacket might also give you the goosebumps.      Model's Statistics: 1. The model wears size M in jacket. 2. Height-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
